title: Direct Routing and Bounded Worker Pools · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs direct routing and bounded worker pools from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a capacity-aware Go work distribution service after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Design direct exchange bindings that keep producer intent stable while consumer queues evolve; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use one queue with multiple consumers for load distribution and state that each delivery goes to one active consumer at a time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 4993 during consumer shutdown drill with one blocked handler goroutine. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then reuse a message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Worker Effect Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Worker Effect Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Worker Effect Evidence, keep Worker Effect Evidence connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Worker Effect Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Worker Effect Evidence through the concrete a capacity-aware Go work distribution service case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Worker Effect Evidence, keep Worker Effect Evidence connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Worker Effect Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Worker Effect Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Worker Effect Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review Go messaging team handles case 5184 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then introduce a keyed sequence gap during single-active failover. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Worker Effect Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A worker should acknowledge before starting slow work to prevent duplicates. In Go, one goroutine per delivery is not a capacity or fairness policy.
